summary: Comprehensive testing of Here & Now app-wide rules: Age Gate, Name Validation, Last Active Filter, Premium Sorting, Clear from Matches, and Motion Blur CSS. All 20 backend tests passed. All frontend UI flows verified working correctly.

age_gate.description: Registration requires age_confirmed=true. Without it, returns 400 'You must confirm you are 18 or older'. UI shows Age Verification screen with checkbox before registration form.

name_validation.description: Backend validates display_name for PII (5+ digits, @, URLs, social handles) and offensive content. Returns 400 'Name contains blocked content' for violations.

name_non_editable.description: Display name cannot be changed after registration. PUT /api/auth/profile silently reverts name changes to original. Settings page shows disabled input with '(set at signup, cannot be changed)' warning.

last_active_filter.description: Who's Here page has filter dropdown with 4 options: All users, Active now (≤2min), Active recently (≤10min), Active this hour (≤60min). Backend accepts last_active_filter param and filters users accordingly.

premium_sorting.description: Backend sorts premium users first in Who's Here list. Response includes is_premium field for each user.

clear_from_matches.description: DELETE /api/connections/{user_id}/clear removes glances and connections but preserves chat history. UI has clear button (UserMinus icon) in Mutual Matches tab with confirmation modal.

motion_blur_css.description: CSS classes defined: .motion-blur (blur 8px, scale 1.05), .motion-blur-reveal (no blur), .premium-glow (amber shadow). Applied to profile photos in WhosHere and Connections pages based on reveal status.

passed_tests: test_name_change_silently_reverted - Profile update reverts name changes

ui_tests_verified.age_gate_screen: Shows Age Verification title, 18+ warning, checkbox, disabled Continue button until checked
ui_tests_verified.registration_form: Shows 'First Name (cannot be changed later)' warning, validates name in real-time
ui_tests_verified.settings_page: Display name input is disabled with '(set at signup, cannot be changed)' label
ui_tests_verified.whos_here_filter: Filter dropdown with All users, Active now (≤2min), Active recently (≤10min), Active this hour (≤60min)
ui_tests_verified.connections_mutual_matches: Tab shows Mutual Matches with clear button (UserMinus icon) and confirmation modal

critical_code_review_comments: Age gate properly enforced at registration - cannot bypass
Name validation patterns comprehensive - blocks PII and offensive content
Name lock implemented correctly - original_display_name stored and enforced
Last Active filter uses correct time thresholds (2/10/60 minutes)
Premium sorting uses stable sort with premium users first
Clear from matches preserves chat history as designed
Motion blur CSS uses blur(8px) with scale transform for directional effect
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_app_rules.py - Created comprehensive test suite for app-wide rules
seed_data_creation: Test users created during registration tests with unique emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: App-wide rules fully tested. Key features: (1) Age gate requires age_confirmed=true at registration, (2) Name validation blocks PII/offensive content, (3) Display name locked after registration, (4) Who's Here has Last Active filter with 4 options, (5) Premium users sorted first, (6) Clear from Matches preserves chat history, (7) Motion blur CSS applied to non-revealed photos. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_app_rules.py covers all functionality.
